title: Sistema KLIP IT Plus Leakproof Juice Jug | 2 L | Airtight Plastic Jug for Milk, Water & More | BPA-Free
features: A HIGH-QUALITY LEAKPROOF JUICE JUG: Designed with a built-in leak-proof seal for mess-free storing and pouring
EASY TO POUR: Strong sturdy handle and air valve under the spout clip allows liquids to pour smoothly
SLIM, ERGONOMIC DESIGN: Designed to fit on the inside door of most refrigerators, providing the ideal space-saving solution
DIMENSIONS: L 164mm x H 253mm x W 109mm
CARE INSTRUCTIONS: Dishwasher (top rack), microwave (without lid), fridge and freezer-safe; designed and made in New Zealand; phthalate and BPA-free
description: From the manufacturer KLIP IT PLUS Juice Store and pour your juice and beverages easily with the Sistema KLIP IT PLUS Juice Jug. Designed with a built in leak-proof seal and easy-lock spout which prevents spills when transporting. This product is safe to use in the dishwasher (on the top rack), the microwave (without the lid), or in the fridge and freezer. Easy-lock spout prevents spills when transporting Perfect for storing drinks in the refrigerator or using at barbecues and parties The clear jug base allows you to easily identify the contents Why You'll Love It Leak Proof Seal Leak proof seal on the lid and easy-lock spout prevents spills when transporting. Simply fill the container, pop on the lid, close the spout clip and the distinctive Sistema easy-locking clips. Easy Pour Keep your juice and beverages fresh with our easy-to-pour juice jug. The strong sturdy handle and air valve under the spout clip allows liquids to pour smoothly. Stylish Slim Design Sistema’s 2 Litre Juice Jug is designed to fit on the inside door of most refrigerators. The slimline design provides the ideal space-saving solution. Made in New Zealand Made in New Zealand from Phthalate free and BPA free materials.* * Tested in a Swiss-based accredited laboratory. (Test Report # 2020L38928/1, issued in 2020).

specifications_table.Product care instructions: ‎Hand wash lid separately. Top rack dishwasher safe. Microwave safe without lid. Store in fridge/freezer.
